positive: A minimalist, highly stylized jungle animal print design featuring a coiled jaguar and a leaping macaws in a symmetrical, repeating pattern. The style is a blend of Art Deco geometry and modern tribal illustration. Use sharp, clean lines and bold, contrasting colors—deep emerald green, sapphire blue, burnt orange, and gold accents. The composition must be centralized and highly scalable for apparel. The jaguar should have a sleek, almost abstract silhouette. Clean white background space around the main motif to allow for printing and cropping. Hyper-detailed linework, vector graphic quality, perfect symmetry, high contrast, flat graphic design, negative space utilization, illustration.
negative: blur, artifacts, watermark, logo, text, extra limbs, poor anatomy, bad hands, low resolution, noise, grainy, photorealistic, 3d render, signature, dirty, messy, complex background, gradients
